mapper.select: INSERT INTO agent_message ( task_id, turn_id, run_id, role, content, sequence_no, status, token_estimate, metadata, created_at, updated_at ) VALUES ( #{taskId}, #{turnId}, #{runId}, 'assistant', #{content}, DEFAULT, 'active', #{tokenEstimate}, #{metadata,jdbcType=OTHER,typeHandler=org.congcong.algomentor.agent.persistence.postgres.json.JsonbMapTypeHandler}, #{createdAt}, #{updatedAt} ) RETURNING id
mapper.update: UPDATE agent_run SET status = 'succeeded', provider = #{provider}, model = #{model}, finish_reason = #{finishReason}, usage = #{usage,jdbcType=OTHER,typeHandler=org.congcong.algomentor.agent.persistence.postgres.json.JsonbTypeHandler}, ended_at = #{endedAt} WHERE id = #{runId}

UPDATE agent_turn SET status = 'succeeded', assistant_message_id = COALESCE(#{assistantMessageId}, assistant_message_id), accepted_run_id = #{runId}, current_run_id = #{runId}, updated_at = #{updatedAt} WHERE id = #{turnId}
